submission.workflow_yaml:
name: concurrency-04-cancel-expr-true
on: workflow_dispatch
concurrency:
  group: cancel-expr-true
  cancel-in-progress: ${{ true }}
jobs:
  long:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: sleep-long
        run: |
          echo "SCENARIO=04-cancel-expr-true"
          sleep 30
          echo "SHOULD_NOT_REACH"
